sheetDescriptions.A1: Water/ground animations (tileset index 0). Contains animated water surfaces, deep water, waterfalls. Kinds 0-3 are water surfaces with animation, 4-5 are deep water, 6+ are ground/waterfall combos.
sheetDescriptions.A2: Floor/ground autotiles (tileset index 1). Top 2 rows = ground type, bottom row = decoration/border. Kinds 0-15 = floors with border transitions. Table flag = 0x80.
sheetDescriptions.A3: Roof/building autotiles (tileset index 2). Kinds 0-7 = roofs (wall-top type), 8-15 = walls (wall-side type). Uses WALL_AUTOTILE_TABLE.
sheetDescriptions.A4: Wall/floor interior autotiles (tileset index 3). Even kinds = floor/wall-top, odd kinds = wall-side. Uses FLOOR_AUTOTILE_TABLE for wall-tops, WALL_AUTOTILE_TABLE for wall-sides.
sheetDescriptions.A5: Static tiles (tileset index 4). No autotile behavior. 8 columns x 16 rows = 128 tiles. IDs 1536-2047.
sheetDescriptions.B: Normal tiles page 1 (tileset index 5). 8 columns x 16 rows = 128 tiles. IDs 0-255.
sheetDescriptions.C: Normal tiles page 2 (tileset index 6). Same layout. IDs 256-511.
sheetDescriptions.D: Normal tiles page 3 (tileset index 7). Same layout. IDs 512-767.
sheetDescriptions.E: Normal tiles page 4 (tileset index 8). Same layout. IDs 768-1535.

layers.0: lower tile slot 1 — ground, rendered below characters. Contains ground/floor autotiles.
layers.1: lower tile slot 2 — ground, rendered below characters. Second ground layer for overlapping ground tiles.
layers.2: upper tile slot 1 — rendered above characters if the tile has the star flag (0x10). Used for tree canopies, roofs, decorations.
layers.3: upper tile slot 2 — rendered above characters if the tile has the star flag (0x10). Second upper layer.
layers.4: shadow bits — integer bitmask 0–15. Each of the 4 bits represents a quarter-tile shadow. This is NOT a tile ID. Writing a tile ID here will produce incorrect shadow artifacts.
layers.5: region ID — integer 1–255. Used to define encounter regions, event trigger zones, and spawn areas. Value 0 means no region.
